svg.title: Simulated REALM feature-space evolution
svg.desc: Four simulated embedding panels show patient-specific clusters after Stage 1, blurred patient boundaries during adversarial training, separate non-seizure and seizure clusters after Stage 2, and samples from a new patient mapping into the two shared seizure-state clusters. These are conceptual coordinates, not measured model embeddings.

cc:Work.dc:description: Four simulated embedding panels show patient-specific clusters after Stage 1, blurred patient boundaries during adversarial training, separate non-seizure and seizure clusters after Stage 2, and samples from a new patient mapping into the two shared seizure-state clusters. These are conceptual coordinates, not measured model embeddings.

g.text: REALM feature-space geometry across training stages

g.text: Conceptual embedding coordinates show the intended transition from patient identity to seizure state.

g.text: SIMULATED source rows are committed with a fixed random seed; coordinates are conceptual and must not be read as model results.

g.text: Panels 1–2: patient marker/color • open = non-seizure • filled = seizure
